name: Teach Them Fear

abilities.name: Black Blood
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, enemy models within (t)1" gain an Injured token.

abilities.name: Cruel Teachings
abilities.text: After this model fails a duel during its activation, it may deal 1 damage to itself.

actions.name: Sever Artery
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to allies within range. This model heals 1 for each ally damaged. When Black Blood occurs due to this action, any enemies that would gain an Injured token but cannot because they already have one are dealt 1 damage.

extraction_notes: Black Blood ability has specific interaction with Sever Artery action regarding Injured tokens
